name: Crystal Guard TD
short_description: Stop hordes of robots from destroying your Crystal shrine in this random shop tower defense game! Instead of choosing exactly what tower to place down, the random shop gives you 3 random towers to choose from. Set up your defenses and see if you can survive!
detailed_description:
Introducing Crystal Guard TD, a dynamic twist on tower defense!

Make strategic choices in a shop where you're presented with three randomly selected tower options. Spend wisely and combine three identical towers to level them up.

Features
  • 20 different towers to try
  • 25+ different Power ups
  • Pixel graphics
  • In-game tutorial slides
  • 6 Levels to complete

Your mission? Defend your crystal shrine against 20 waves of relentless robots. Can you outwit your enemies and emerge victorious?
